# The Makhana

> The Makhana is a premium Indian D2C brand selling roasted and raw makhana (foxnuts / phool makhana). Based in Delhi, with makhana sourced from Bihar. Roasted in cold-pressed/olive oil, never deep-fried - high-protein (~9g/100g), gluten-free, non-GMO, no palm oil, no maida, no MSG.

## Shop
- [Shop all foxnuts](https://www.themakhana.in/shop.html): every roasted and raw makhana flavour and the variety combo.
- [Peri Peri Punch](https://www.themakhana.in/product.html?id=peri): bestselling spicy roasted makhana.
- [Raw Phool Makhana](https://www.themakhana.in/product.html?id=raw): premium handpicked raw foxnuts.
- [Variety Combo](https://www.themakhana.in/product.html?id=combo): five signature flavours, best value.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://www.themakhana.in/): brand overview and bestsellers.
- [Our Story](https://www.themakhana.in/about.html): how The Makhana sources from Bihar and packs in Delhi.
- [Blog](https://www.themakhana.in/blog.html): guides on makhana benefits, nutrition and recipes.
- [Contact](https://www.themakhana.in/contact.html): customer support, gifting and bulk enquiries.

## Blog / guides

- [Is Makhana Good for Weight Loss? What the Science Says](https://www.themakhana.in/blog-makhana-weight-loss.html)
- [Makhana for Diabetes: Is Foxnut Safe for Blood Sugar?](https://www.themakhana.in/blog-makhana-diabetes.html)
- [Makhana During Pregnancy: Benefits, Safety & Servings](https://www.themakhana.in/blog-makhana-pregnancy.html)
- [How to Roast Makhana at Home: 5 Crispy Flavours](https://www.themakhana.in/blog-how-to-roast-makhana.html)
- [10 Easy Makhana Recipes: From Roasted Snacks to Kheer](https://www.themakhana.in/blog-makhana-recipes.html)
- [Makhana vs Popcorn vs Almonds: Which Healthy Snack Wins?](https://www.themakhana.in/blog-makhana-vs-popcorn.html)
